mapper.select: select a.reqid, a.aprvlineid, a.seq, a.approvalid , a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.requesterid, a.requestername, DATE_FORMAT(a.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(a.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, a.reqreason from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a where a.approvalid = #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and a.requesterid = #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.reqid desc limit 1

select b.* from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline a, cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser b, cotdl.tbl_member m where a.aprvlineid = b.aprvlineid and a.approvalid = #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and b.APPROVERID = m.userid and m.dept_cd = #{deptid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by b.seq, b.aprvlineid limit 1

select a.reqid, a.aprvlineid, a.seq, a.approvalid , a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.requesterid, a.requestername, DATE_FORMAT(a.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(a.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, a.reqreason from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a order by reqid desc
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovalreq (reqid, aprvlineid, seq, approvalid, phase, jobid, version, requesterid, requestername, regdate, upddate, reqreason) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reqreason, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovalreq (reqid, aprvlineid, seq, approvalid, phase, jobid, version, requesterid, requestername, regdate, upddate, reqreason) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requesterid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reqreason, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select a.reqid, a.aprvlineid, a.seq, a.approvalid , a.phase, a.jobid, a.version , a.requesterid, a.requestername, DATE_FORMAT(a.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(a.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate, a.reqreason from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq a where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate = NOW() where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set phase= 'REJECTED', upddate = NOW() where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq set seq= #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW() where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
